## Blocked path

Which file or directory could not be processed?

## Operation type

- cleanup
- migration
- registry-linked action

## What blocker information was shown?

Paste the process name, PID, or diagnostic message if available.

## Expected behavior

Describe what should have happened after the blocking process was handled.
